backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the backend with access control, user profiles, price alerts, and HTTP outcalls to CoinGecko for live ICP and UNI prices, plus portfolio and crypto data types.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Top100Dashboard, filter/sort bar, price projections) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing each component's purpose, hooks, and utilities at a high level.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient with caching/retry config, dark-mode ThemeProvider, and renders Header, Top100Dashboard, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing copyright year, caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM params, and CoinGecko data source and auto-refresh notes.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header displaying the Crypto Tracker AI brand with a gradient title, live pulsing badge, and auto-refresh label.
frontend/src/components/PriceProjections: React component rendering a 12-month price projection section with a searchable coin selector, a monthly low/mid/high table, and a Recharts area chart using linear-regression-based projections from coin history data.
A paginated, sortable dashboard table displaying the top 100 cryptocurrencies with filtering by search and metrics (market cap, volume, buy ratio, FDV), integrating with the Top100FilterBar and PriceProjectionsSection components.
A filter bar component for the Top100Dashboard providing a search input and metric-based sort dropdowns (market cap, volume, buy ratio, FDV) with reset functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions and identity state via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching top 100 coin market data and 30-day coin price history from the CoinGecko API, with in-memory caching and rate-limit handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file establishing a dark-first crypto theme using Tailwind with custom OKLCH color tokens, glassmorphism utilities, neon glow effects, animations, and a custom scrollbar style.
frontend/src/lib/indicators.ts: Technical indicators library implementing RSI, EMA, MACD, and TTM Squeeze calculations on price data arrays, returning typed result objects with timestamps and values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/projections.ts: Generates 12-month log-normal price projections (low/mid/high with confidence scores) from historical prices using linear regression and volatility, plus price/number formatting helpers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark-mode crypto-themed design system with custom OKLCH color tokens, typography/mono fonts, glow shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking version, architecture notes, known issues, and the list of implemented features for a CoinGecko-powered top-150 crypto dashboard with filtering, projections, and technical indicators.
